title: BarkLock
description: Prevents accidental wood stripping. You can only remove bark from logs while sneaking.
body:
# **BarkLock**

BarkLock is a simple utility mod that tackles a common builder blunder: accidentally stripping the bark off log blocks. When you’ve got an axe in hand or you’re mid-build, it’s easy to misclick and ruin a log’s look. This mod adds a tiny safety net to keep that from happening.

With BarkLock installed, right-clicking a log with an axe does nothing—the bark stays put. If you actually want to take the bark off, just hold the sneak key (Shift) while right-clicking.

###  Main features:

**Safety first:** Stops accidental log edits while you’re moving around or building.

**Simple mechanic:** No fiddly menus or settings. Sneak to bypass the lock only when you need to.

**Server friendly:** Install it on a server to protect the world for everyone. Players don’t need the mod on their own setup to benefit from the protection.

 **Performance:** Tiny footprint, no hit to frame rate or loading times.

 **_Installation and compatibility:_** Built for Fabric Loader, compatible with Minecraft 1.21-1.21.11. Drop the jar into your mods folder and you’re good to go.
